subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest my tribulations throughout all days, as I am imprisoned together with seventy souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری ابتلائی فی کل الایام قد حبستنی مع سبعین انفس من
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
